title: Harden a deploy stage in the pipeline
description: Gate deployment behind protected refs, environments, manual approval, and least-privilege credentials.
body: Steps: 1. Move deploy jobs to a dedicated stage gated by rules to protected branches/tags only. 2. Bind the job to a GitLab environment with a deployment approval/protected-environment rule. 3. Set when: manual for production so a human triggers it. 4. Scope deploy credentials to protected, environment-scoped variables and the minimal access needed. 5. Record the deployed commit and produce a provenance trail. Rollback point: a documented rollback job or prior environment deployment. Validation: production deploy requires a protected ref plus manual approval and uses credentials unavailable to non-protected pipelines.
